label: The Ironbound Loft
description: The Ironbound Loft forms a narrow guest room under the Black Ledger’s low rafters, its soot-blackened beams cinched with riveted iron straps to match the tavern’s buttressed construction. A rope-lashed cot and a bolted trunk sit on worn planks, while a chain-hung lamp burns behind smoke-stained glass to keep light subdued. One slit window is fitted with an interior grate and oiled canvas shutter, reflecting Cindervale’s quarantine ordinances and interdiction nights. A small plaque of house rules and licensing notices is nailed beside the latch, treating the room as a space governed by written law rather than custom.
